调用 session.query(models.Domain.name, models.Disk.type).join(models.Osd, models.Domain.name == models.Osd.domain_name).join(models.DiskBlock, models.Osd.name == models.DiskBlock.osd_name).join(models.DiskPartition, models.DiskBlock.id == models.DiskPartition.block_id).join(models.Disk, models.DiskBlock.wwid == models.Disk.wwid).filter(and_(models.DiskPartition.purpose == 'meta', models.Domain.purpose.in_([cluster_storage_type.StorageType.ObjectGateway, cluster_storage_type.StorageType.HyperFusion]))).group_by

调用 session.query(models.Domain.name, models.Disk.type).join(models.Osd, models.Domain.name == models.Osd.domain_name).join(models.DiskBlock, models.Osd.name == models.DiskBlock.osd_name).join(models.DiskPartition, models.DiskBlock.id == models.DiskPartition.block_id).join(models.Disk, models.DiskBlock.wwid == models.Disk.wwid).filter

functions.name: get_used_capacity_of_cluster

调用 session.query(models.Domain, func.sum(models.DiskPartition.capacity).label('capacity')).join(models.Osd, models.Domain.name == models.Osd.domain_name).join(models.DiskBlock, models.Osd.name == models.DiskBlock.osd_name).join(models.DiskPartition, models.DiskBlock.id == models.DiskPartition.block_id).filter

调用 session.query(models.Domain.name, models.Osd.hostid, func.count(models.Osd.hostid).label('osd_num')).join(models.Osd, models.Domain.name == models.Osd.domain_name).filter
